title: MRPG+Tech
description: This Modpack is an expended version of ther original MRPG - Massive Role Play Game with tech.
body:
# General information
This modpack allows you to experience Minecraft in a new way. The theme of the modpack is Fantasy RPG Roguelike. It runs very smoothly on the systems I use. The modpack is released with resourcepacks and shaders.

**You can use the modpack freely.**

## Contents & external links:


The modpack adds following contents:</summary>

- Tech like Mekanism
- More structures
- New Biome generation
- New Weapons and Armors
- Leveling system
- Fantasy Origins
- Roguelike fighting
- Better third person
- New Bosses
- Dehydration
- Combat rolls
- Dungeons
- Performance emprovements
- Map and Minimap
- Midnight Controls for Controller/Joycon support
- Modlist menu
- better dimensions
- Magic content
- early Stage so you have to use Flint tools first
- seasons like summer and so on
- envirement mod that gives cold and hot effects so u have to watch out for your body temperature




<details>
<summary>External Mod links:</summary>

Aquaculture 2: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
Macaw's Windows (mc-windows): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows
structory: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory

</details>
